MASTER CALENDAR MOTION ON SEP-24-2014 IN DEPT. 206, HEARING ON APPLICANT/DEFENDANT NAWAF AL THAQFI'S WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS. NO APPEARANCE BY APPLICANT. THE COURT DENIED THE APPLICATION IN WHOLE. ORDER SIGNED, AND ENDORSED-FILED COPY MAILED TO APPLICANT. JUDGE: JAMES J. MCBRIDE; CLERK: RVELUZ; MATTER NOT REPORTED. (206)
